Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Ferry loadouts are available to most aircraft with hardpoints that can mount external fuel tanks. These loadouts will replace all weaponry with drop tanks, extending the aircraft's range as far as possible.
This loadout can be used to increase the endurance of helicopters if you are intending to only use them as airborne radar platforms!
